items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Felt Glitter CF
Dimensions: 10x20x7cm
The new 24B felt glitter CF is bursting with girlishness. The gentle tone and texture capture the heartstrings. The pinkish hue is like the softest cherry blossoms brushing against a girl's dream in spring. The bag body is embellished with small gold double-Cs, like a fairytale wonderland, intoxicating. The pink-gold woven chain design makes the bag look even more ethereal. The felt material combined with exquisite plaid shows an unintentional elegance and sweetness. The beautiful bag I'm talking about is her.

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 25A Runway Edition
Size: 20x13x7(cm)
25A New Fall/Winter Makeup Bag 🆕 This popular style is highly recommended by Chanel. It is an elegant and luxurious bag that can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The bag features double C logos, giving it a strong vintage retro vibe. It has a regular and structured shape, suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, 14k pale gold hardware, and imported lambskin~ The texture is soft and worth buying, exuding nobility everywhere.

items.name_cn:
Chanel 2020 Atelier
Size: 22*13.5*13.5cm
The 20a Atelier series features a birdcage design that is stunning in person, a true work of art. Inspired by the classical birdcage in Coco Chanel's apartment, this golden metal birdcage is adorned with sparkling rhinestones and French coins. A pair of goldfinches perches on the door frame, exuding a luxurious style and exquisite craftsmanship. Highly collectible.

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 24s Glitter CF
Size: 20(cm)
New 24s glitter is here. Compared to other models, this one features a mix of matte and glitter, making it extremely difficult to produce. The soft blue~ lively pink~ are like a splash of bright color in a dream, radiating a charming color palette. Whether it's the soft texture or the exquisite chain, it looks super good~

Chanel 24B Bow🎀 Glitter CF
Size: 21(cm)
New 24B Bow🎀 Glitter bag is here.
It might be a best-seller among the many bow elements in the 24A series.
This season, a new glitter model with bow elements is released.
The development difficulty is high, and the placement matches the original exactly.
